title: HOUSING RETENTION PROGRAM - 211info
text: ACCESS HOUSING RETENTION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assists with mortgage and rent payments based on available funding, limited to once every two years per household. Emergency assistance is not available. Eligible applicants are placed on a waitlist. 3630 Aviation Way Medford, OR 97504 Eligibility: Varies by service, with a focus on individuals and families who are either currently homeless or at risk of becoming homeless Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm, Friday 8am-4:30pm Email (541) 494-1210 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 779-6691 Main phone Main phone (541) 494-1210 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of income, proof of homelessness or eviction LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Jackson County Services: Mortgage Payment Assistance Rent Payment Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - COMMUNITY ACTION AGENCY DISASTER SERVICES - CENTER FOR COMMUNITY RESILIENCE FOOD - FOOD PANTRIES FOOD - SENIOR FOOD PANTRIES HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - DURABLE MEDICAL EQUIPMENT PROGRAM HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OVER THE TOP WIG PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - AFFORDABLE HOUSING HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMEOWNERSHIP CENTER HOUSING/SHELTER - JACKSON COUNTY CONTINUUM OF CARE SCREENINGS HOUSING/SHELTER - RENT DEPOSIT ASSISTANCE HOUSING/SHELTER - WEATHERIZATION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SUPPORTIVE SERVICES FOR VETERAN FAMILIES INFORMATION SERVICES - OUTREACH TO SENIORS AND PEOPLE WITH DISABILITIES UTILITIES - ENERGY ASSISTANCE PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ACCESS
